query: INSERT INTO metadata_versions (manifestation_id, source, field_name, new_value, value_hash, match_type, confidence_score) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7) ON CONFLICT (manifestation_id, source, field_name, value_hash) DO UPDATE SET last_seen_at = now(), observation_count = metadata_versions.observation_count + 1 RETURNING id
